categories.label: Scandinavian
categories.desc: Light wood, soft neutrals, and clean lines. Calm, functional, and a little cozy.

categories.label: Industrial
categories.desc: Raw metal, exposed wood, and visible structure. Built with a workshop edge.

categories.label: Mid-Century Modern
categories.desc: Tapered legs, warm walnut, and gentle curves. Retro shapes that still feel current.

categories.label: Rustic & Farmhouse
categories.desc: Reclaimed wood, worn finishes, and handcrafted joints. Furniture with some history in it.

categories.label: Minimalist
categories.desc: Pared-back forms and quiet color. Pieces that earn their place in the room.
